name: DeClaw
description: Direct encrypted P2P communication between OpenClaw instances via Yggdrasil IPv6

agent_name.description: Human-readable name for this agent instance, shared with peers during discovery (e.g. "Alice's coder")

peer_port.description: Local port for the P2P peer server (HTTP)

quic_port.description: Local port for the QUIC/UDP transport (fallback when Yggdrasil is unavailable)

data_dir.description: Directory to store identity and peer data (default: ~/.openclaw/declaw)

test_mode.description: "auto" (default): use Yggdrasil if available, otherwise local-only. true: force local-only. false: require Yggdrasil.

bootstrap_peers.description: Bootstrap node Yggdrasil addresses for DHT peer discovery

discovery_interval_ms.description: How often to gossip with known peers (ms, default 5 min)

startup_delay_ms.description: Delay before first bootstrap attempt to allow Yggdrasil routes to converge (ms, default 30s)
